text.zh: 你一個人最放鬆的時候，通常會做什麼？
text.en: What do you usually do to relax when you're by yourself?

text.zh: 最近有哪件小事，讓你覺得自己還不錯？
text.en: Has anything small happened lately that made you feel pretty good about yourself?

text.zh: 你覺得自己有哪個小習慣，其實滿可愛的？
text.en: What little habit of yours do you think is actually kind of cute?

text.zh: 一天裡，哪個時刻最讓你覺得自在？
text.en: What time of day makes you feel most at ease?

text.zh: 如果不用考慮現實，你最近會想把時間留給什麼？
text.en: If practical concerns didn't matter, what would you want to make more time for these days?

text.zh: 你壓力很大的時候，最容易變成什麼樣子？
text.en: When you're under a lot of stress, what side of you tends to come out?

text.zh: 你一生氣時，心裡最先冒出來的感覺通常是什麼？
text.en: When you get angry, what's usually the first feeling that comes up inside?

text.zh: 你外表看起來很像哪種人，但其實不完全是那樣？
text.en: What kind of person do you seem like on the outside, even though that's not entirely who you are?

text.zh: 有沒有什麼小事，你嘴上說沒關係，其實心裡會在意？
text.en: Is there any small thing you say is fine, but deep down, you actually care about?

text.zh: 你最不擅長表現出哪一種情緒？
text.en: Which emotion are you least comfortable showing?

text.zh: 你現在最想慢慢練習成為什麼樣的人？
text.en: What kind of person do you want to gradually grow into right now?

text.zh: 你覺得哪件小事，悄悄把你塑造成現在的你？
text.en: What small thing do you think quietly shaped you into who you are today?

text.zh: 如果人生重來一次，你最想保留自己的哪個特質？
text.en: If you could live your life over again, which trait of yours would you most want to keep?

text.zh: 你心裡有沒有一個還不太敢說出口的夢想？
text.en: Is there a dream you still don't quite dare to say out loud?

text.zh: 你覺得自己身上的哪個缺點，其實也曾經保護過你？
text.en: Which flaw of yours do you think has actually protected you at some point?

text.zh: 你什麼時候最容易忘記要溫柔對待自己？
text.en: When are you most likely to forget to be gentle with yourself?

text.zh: 有沒有一個你平常很少讓人看到的樣子？
text.en: Is there a side of you that you rarely let others see?

text.zh: 你有沒有一個關於自己的部分，是你還在學習接受的？
text.en: Is there a part of yourself that you're still learning to accept?

text.zh: 你一個人消化掉某件事之後，通常會用什麼方式讓自己好過一點？
text.en: After you've processed something on your own, how do you usually help yourself feel a little better?

text.zh: 如果現在可以放心說一句真心話，你最想讓人知道什麼？
text.en: If you could say one honest thing without fear right now, what would you want others to know?
